title: Cottage World
description:
Welcome to a cozy modpack filled with tons of explorable beautiful lands and building blocks for your tiny cottage.

I hope you enjoy this pack, i'm open for feedback on the pack!
body:
![CW logo over the lake](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/713748f50aea5cb882ace7060fba76bd66ef479c.png)
#   🏡 Welcome to Cottage World!

**Immerse yourself in a cozy, relaxing Minecraft experience designed for players who love to build, farm, and explore at their own pace. Cottage World transforms your Minecraft world into a charming, atmospheric countryside filled with lush landscapes, adorable animals, and warm, homely aesthetics.**
## 🌿 Features
- 🌱Cozy Aesthetic - Beautiful biomes, soft lighting, and rustic building options create a warm and welcoming atmosphere.
- 🌾Enhanced Farming & Cooking - A variety of crops, cooking mechanics, and decorative elements make for a richer homestead experience.
- ⚙️Create Mod Support - Automate your world with intuitive mechanical systems while keeping the cozy theme alive.
- 🎵Custom Music & Menu - Includes Sunlit Meadows and a fully customized Menu so you can start the pack with a calm cozy feel.
- 🗳️Exploration & Discovery - Discover vibrant villages, custom structures, and hidden secrets across the world.
- 🌟Low-Stress Gameplay - Designed for casual play, whether solo or with friends.

Experience the simple joys of Cottage World. Whether you're farming under the sunset, designing the perfect rustic home, or just taking in the scenery, this modpack is perfect for a stress-free Minecraft adventure. 🌾✨

## Coziest Modpack Trailer!
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/wd_wOdh8Dc4" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

# New VR Support!
- Finally added working and optimized support for VR, creating extra fun moments with friends or a brand new experience in the Cottage World modpack!

# 🔗 Community & Support
- Discord - [https://discord.gg/FNucZGac4t](https://discord.gg/FNucZGac4t)
- Feedback & Bug Reports - Let us know about any issues or suggestions!
- Need help with setting up a server? Join my Discord and file a ticket, I'll help out personally!

With 240+ mods to explore, Cottage World transforms your Minecraft world into a lush, vibrant haven of adventure. Plus, we’re always improving! Join the community to share feedback and suggestions.

# Remember to allocate at least 4GB = 4096MB Ram!
